name: Confirm Transaction
desc: Client confirms receipt of a S32PacketConfirmTransaction (server inventory transaction).

fields.name: uid
fields.desc: Transaction UID matching the server's confirm packet

implementation.overview: C0FPacketConfirmTransaction is the client response to server inventory transactions (S32PacketConfirmTransaction). It confirms that the client processed a window action (C0E click). The packet carries windowId, actionNumber (short), and accepted (boolean). This packet is HEAVILY targeted by Disabler modules because it's used by Watchdog (Hypixel) to correlate client-side vs server-side inventory state. Delaying or corrupting C0F breaks Watchdog's ability to track what the player is doing.

modules.name: Watchdog Disabler (Hypixel)
modules.purpose: Prevent Watchdog from correlating inventory actions with movement, effectively disabling the anti-cheat.
modules.how_it_works: All outgoing C0F (and C00) packets are cancelled and queued for a configurable delay (typically 350ms). After the delay, ALL queued packets are flushed at once. Watchdog processes the burst and its sliding window de-syncs, causing it to stop flagging the player. Some modes also spoof C0F with Integer.MAX_VALUE window ID to corrupt Watchdog's tracking.

modules.name: Velocity (Cancel on hurt)
modules.purpose: Cancel C0F when the player has been hit to negate knockback.
modules.how_it_works: When the player's hurtTime > 0, all outgoing C0F packets are cancelled. This prevents the server from confirming the transaction that followed the damage, which causes the server to not apply the knockback velocity.

modules.name: PingSpoof (C0F queue)
modules.purpose: Queue C0F alongside C00 to delay all timing-sensitive packets.
modules.how_it_works: Same pattern as PingSpoof for C00: cancel + store with future timestamp, release when timer fires.

implementation.general_hooks: EventSendPacket. Server handler: NetHandlerPlayServer.processConfirmTransaction(). The actionNumber must match between S32 and C0F.
implementation.client_variations:
Tenacity 5.1: Watchdog queue+burst at 350ms. Also Velocity C0F cancel.
Lycoris 2.0: Spoof with MAX_VALUE window ID.
November 0.2: Combined queue with C00. Also corrupts C00 key on disabler.
Sigma 3.9: Blocks C0F by mode. Also tracks C0F for critical sync.
Raze v1.5b: C0F dropping for hypixel fast disabler.
